_patch_meta.description: Repair patch — Registry 211 (being): replace 15 placeholder context_descriptions in verse_context_group with correct descriptions from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md. Root cause: patch construction for VCB-029 did not draw Reg 211 group descriptions from the observations file. The wa_dimension_index.context_description field must be synced after application.

set.context_description: Term names the inner state of perplexity — being at a loss, uncertain, or disturbed without being driven to despair
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder description replaced with correct description from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md

operations.description: 4482-001 (aporeō, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names deep inner perplexity — the state of being thoroughly at a loss before spiritual or extraordinary reality
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder description replaced with correct description from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md

operations.description: 4481-001 (diaporeō, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner disposition of thinking too highly of oneself — self-inflated assessment contrasted with sober self-knowledge
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder description replaced with correct description from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md

operations.description: 4473-001 (huperfroneō, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner disposition of haughtiness — self-elevation and valuing what is exalted among people, warned against in favour of humility and fear
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder description replaced with correct description from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md

operations.description: 4440-001 (hupsēlos, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner disposition of arrogance — the haughtiness of the wealthy person who sets themselves above others and above God
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder description replaced with correct description from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md

operations.description: 4439-001 (hupsēlofroneō, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner disposition of careful attentiveness — the thoughtful orientation of the person toward devoted action
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder description replaced with correct description from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md

operations.description: 4451-001 (frontizō, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner condition of brutish insensibility — the person who is beast-like in understanding, unable or unwilling to perceive what is true
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder description replaced with correct description from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md

operations.description: 4450-001 (ba.ar, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the insensitive heart — rendered unfeeling like fat, incapable of genuine response to God or his word
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder description replaced with correct description from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md

operations.description: 4478-001 (ta.phash, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner act of humbling oneself before God — the voluntary posture of the heart that turns from pride and seeks God's face
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder description replaced with correct description from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md

operations.description: 4475-001 (ka.na group A, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names God's act of bringing down the proud or disciplining the people — the inner condition of the person whose heart is humbled by affliction or judgment
set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder description replaced with correct description from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md

operations.description: 4475-002 (ka.na group B, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

set.notes: REPAIR-20260406: placeholder description replaced with correct description from wa-vcb-029-term-observations-v1.1-20260406.md

operations.description: 4485-001 (pa.chaz, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

set.context_description: Term names the inner state of perplexity and bewilderment — the person at a complete loss before an inexplicable event

set.context_description: Term names apparent or feigned madness — the inner state or outer presentation that leads others to perceive a person as mad

set.context_description: Term names the dismissal of prophetic intensity as madness, or the inner disintegration produced by divine judgment

operations.description: 4480-001 (shig.ga.on, Reg 211): correct context_description from observations file

_post_application_instruction.action: After applying all 15 verse_context_group updates, sync wa_dimension_index.context_description for all rows where group_code IN ('4482-001','4481-001','4473-001','4440-001','4439-001','4451-001','4450-001','4478-001','4475-001','4475-002','4485-001','4483-001','4479-001','4479-002','4480-001'). Set wa_dimension_index.context_description = verse_context_group.context_description WHERE wa_dimension_index.group_code = verse_context_group.group_code. Then regenerate the C01 cluster extract.
_post_application_instruction.verification: Confirm that no wa_dimension_index row for Registry 211 retains a context_description beginning with 'Context group for'. Report count of rows updated in both tables.
